calendar.matters:
Petition To Terminate Irrevocable Trust
Off Calendar Jul-31-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Gibbons appeared by telephone for and with Stephen Calegari.

The Court stated that the issue is whether the Trust was properly amended and whether the amendment is valid. Counsel presented oral argument to support her position and referred to the terms/language of the Trust. The Court ruled that the amendment is invalid, that the assets will be distributed to the Petitioners, that 4.1 is not proper and that the Trust itself is silent as to whether the Survivor's Trust was revocable. Ms. Gibbons is to prepare the order.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)
